Some blackberry bushes are near the gazebo, wine berries are all along the path. Blackberries look to be most ripe the end of July/beginning of August. Wineberries early/mid July. Access: Public. Falling Fruit season: July-August.

Wineberries all over the park, good raw or in pies/jams. Access: Public. Falling Fruit season: July-July.
